title: oenanthe sarmentosa var. californica
intro: Oenanthe sarmentosa var. californica, also known as California water parsley, is a variety of aquatic plant belonging to the carrot family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds such as apiol and limonene. The health benefits of Oenanthe sarmentosa var. californica include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
